creator: gpr@mail.ru
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi contains outdated manual pages for new versions of freebsd.

For example, sem_init page for 9-current:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=sem_init&apropos=0&sektion=0&manpath=FreeBSD+9-current&format=html

contains page for FreeBSD 7.2
